connection.reconnect_required: Reconnect required — your access token has expired or been revoked

config.spreadsheet_id_placeholder: Paste a Google Sheets URL or bare spreadsheet ID
config.header_row_hint: The row number that contains column headers (usually 1)
config.data_start_row_hint: The first row of data beneath the header
config.key_column_hint: The column whose value uniquely identifies each record (becomes the external ID)
config.conflict_policy_source_wins: Source wins — remote sheet overwrites local record
config.conflict_policy_local_wins: Local wins — local record is kept, sheet row is skipped
config.conflict_policy_newest_wins: Newest wins — most recently updated side is kept
config.conflict_policy_manual: Manual review — flag conflicts for a human to resolve

mapping.preview_description: Columns detected from the sheet header row. Adjust mappings before running the first sync.
mapping.no_columns_detected: No columns could be detected. Verify the spreadsheet ID, tab name, and header row.

status.run_failed: Sync failed — see error details below

errors.oauth_not_configured: Google OAuth is not configured. Set GOOGLE_SHEETS_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID and GOOGLE_SHEETS_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET in your environment, then restart the app.
errors.reauth_required: Your Google session has expired or been revoked. Reconnect your account to resume syncing.
errors.sheet_unreachable: The spreadsheet could not be reached. Check that the spreadsheet ID is correct and that the connected account has read access.
errors.no_writer_registered: No EntityWriter is registered for entity type “{entityType}”. Register one from your module’s di.ts before running an import.
errors.invalid_config: The integration configuration is incomplete or invalid. Check the spreadsheet ID, tab name, header row, key column, and target entity type.
errors.tab_not_found: Tab “{tab}” was not found in the spreadsheet. Verify the tab name (it is case-sensitive).
errors.key_column_missing: The configured key column “{column}” was not found in the sheet header row.
errors.export_not_supported: Export is not yet supported for entity type “{entityType}”. Implement the read() method on its EntityWriter to enable export.
errors.conflict_unresolved: A sync conflict was detected for record “{externalId}” and the current conflict policy requires manual resolution.
errors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred during sync. Check the server logs for details.
